rationale: stack-pulse-2026-05 PR-01 Phase 1 baseline. PR-01 unified the env *schema* (single Zod source of truth in apps/server/src/env/env.ts; apps/server/src/env.ts is a thin re-export). Raw process.env[…] reads scattered across auth.ts/cors.ts/email/*/obs/* are Phase 2 (a 1-week incremental refactor). Lower this number in any PR that migrates a caller; raise only with an open follow-up issue scheduling the Phase-2 migration. History: 2026-05-07 cleanup migrated getBaseURL/getAdvancedCookieOptions in auth.ts (BETTER_AUTH_URL ×2, REPLIT_DEV_DOMAIN ×2, REPLIT_DOMAINS ×2 collapsed to 1, BETTER_AUTH_CROSS_SITE_COOKIES ×1): net −5, budget 119 → 114. 2026-05-13 ratchet 114 → 117 (+3) absorbs new reads landed via apps/server PRs (auth.ts GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET + BETTER_AUTH_TRUSTED_NATIVE_SCHEMES) ahead of Phase 2 migration; tracked in the T5 Phase-2 audit follow-up issue. 2026-05-13 backend-performance roast (#2642) migrated obs/metrics.ts process.env reads to env.ts (P1-6: GIT_COMMIT, VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA, npm_package_version + appBuildInfo callsite), net −12, budget 117 → 105. 2026-05-13 backend-performance roast P2-1 follow-up migrated modules/push/push.ts (VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY, VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY, VAPID_EMAIL, NODE_ENV, PUSH_SEND_TARGET_LIMIT, PUSH_SEND_TARGET_WINDOW_MS) + routes/push.ts (PUSH_INTERNAL_ALLOWED_IPS) reads to env.ts, with the matching 15+ vi.stubEnv test migrations in modules/push/push.test.ts: net −7, budget 105 → 98. 2026-05-13 revenue-monetization roast P0-7 migrated apps/server/src/modules/billing/stripe.ts (STRIPE_SECRET_KEY + STRIPE_PRICE_ID_PRO_MONTHLY price-id reads) to env.ts; net −2, budget kept at 98 (headroom of 2 — safe to lower in follow-up after CI count confirms). 2026-05-14 backend-perf PR-02 (apps/server/src/obs/tracing.ts) dropped 3× `env: NodeJS.ProcessEnv = process.env` DI defaults — `resolveServiceVersion` / `resolveTracingConfig` / `startTracing` тепер вимагають explicit Zod-validated env (Partial<Pick<Env, OTEL_*|SENTRY_RELEASE|*_GIT_COMMIT_SHA|GITHUB_SHA>>); module-evaluation side-effect передає `env` із `../env.js`. Net −3 + previously latent headroom of 2 → −5; budget 98 → 93. GITHUB_SHA додано у env/env.ts (інші Git-SHA env-vars уже були). See docs/planning/pr-plan-backend-perf-2026-05.md § PR-02, docs/initiatives/stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-01-unify-env-modules.md and scripts/check-env-single-source.mjs.
